scripts.test:api:store: newman run store.collection.json --environment store.environment.json --env-var baseUrl=http://127.0.0.1:3000 --reporters cli,htmlextra,junit,json --reporter-htmlextra-export newman-report/store.html --reporter-htmlextra-title "Store API Newman Report" --reporter-junit-export newman-report/store-junit.xml --reporter-json-export newman-report/store.json --timeout-request 10000 --timeout-script 5000
scripts.test:api:store:ci: newman run store.collection.json --environment store.environment.ci.json --env-var baseUrl=http://127.0.0.1:3000 --reporters cli,htmlextra,junit,json --reporter-htmlextra-export newman-report/store.html --reporter-htmlextra-title "Store API Newman Report" --reporter-junit-export newman-report/store-junit.xml --reporter-json-export newman-report/store.json --timeout-request 10000 --timeout-script 5000
scripts.test:api:petstore: newman run petstore.collection.json --insecure --reporters cli,htmlextra,junit,json --reporter-htmlextra-export newman-report/petstore.html --reporter-htmlextra-title "Petstore API Newman Report" --reporter-junit-export newman-report/petstore-junit.xml --reporter-json-export newman-report/petstore.json --timeout-request 15000 --timeout-script 5000 --delay-request 100
scripts.test:api:stress: newman run store.collection.json --environment store.environment.json --env-var baseUrl=http://127.0.0.1:3000 --iteration-count 5 --reporters cli,junit,json --reporter-junit-export newman-report/store-stress-junit.xml --reporter-json-export newman-report/store-stress.json --timeout-request 10000 --timeout-script 5000
scripts.test:api: npm run test:api:store && npm run test:api:petstore && npm run generate-dashboard
